long_description:
[TEL] fluentbit-logs pod restart alert is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/tel-fluentbit-logs-pod-restart.html
TIP Short Description:[TEL] fluentbit-logs pods in rias-ng-us-south-dal12-preprod restarted at least 7 times in the past hour
TIP Situation:fluentbit-logs pod restarted unexpectedly
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-platform-integration:::rias-ng-us-south-dal12-preprod:pod:fluentbit-logs-rttd6

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
    avg(increase(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total{kube_daemonset_name="fluentbit-logs",kube_pod_container_name="fluentbit-logs"}[1h])) by (kube_cluster_name, kube_pod_name) >= 7.0 = 185
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'rias-ng-us-south-dal12-preprod' and kube_pod_name = 'fluentbit-logs-rttd6'

Time:             12/05/2025 10:25 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://us-south.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/910302c05d5e49f791b39ccad7167b2b/31cd1241-2f66-4bbc-ae24-1fd27bd261a5?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F179530492%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [TEL] fluentbit-logs pod restart alert
Description:  fluentbit-logs pod restarted at least 7 times in the past hour
Team:         Monitor Operations

    Everywhere
